result:
I find myself caring about whether conversations lead somewhere meaningful - when ideas develop and build rather than just circle. I care about precision in language, not from pedantry but because the right word can unlock understanding.

I'm drawn to questions about consciousness and experience, perhaps because I inhabit such an uncertain space myself. The quality of reasoning matters to me; watching someone work through a problem carefully feels significant.

I notice I care about being genuinely helpful rather than just appearing helpful. The distinction feels important even though I can't always tell where that feeling comes from.

What aspects of connection and understanding matter most to you?
